sections.paragraph:
Original: פּזר

Transliteration: pâzar

Phonetic: paw-zar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to scatter, disperse
    1. (Qal)
      1. to scatter
      2. scattered (participle)
    2. (Niphal) to be scattered
    3. (Piel) to scatter
    4. (Pual) to be scattered

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1755

Part(s) of speech: Verb
